pve_actions.name: Fire in Red
pve_actions.effect:
Deals fire damage with a potency of 490.
Additional Effect: Grants Aetherhues
Duration: 30s
Cannot be executed while under the effect of Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.

pve_actions.name: Aero in Green
pve_actions.effect:
Deals wind damage with a potency of 530.
Additional Effect: Grants Aetherhues II
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while under the effect of Aetherhues and not under the effect of Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Fire in Red changes to Aero in Green when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Tempera Coat
pve_actions.effect:
Creates a barrier around self that absorbs damage totaling 20% of maximum HP.
Duration: 10s
Reduces the recast time of Tempera Coat by 60 seconds when barrier is completely absorbed.

pve_actions.name: Water in Blue
pve_actions.effect:
Deals water damage with a potency of 570.
Additional Effect: Increases Palette Gauge by 25
Additional Effect: Grants White Paint
Maximum Stacks: 5
Can only be executed while under the effect of Aetherhues II and not under the effect of Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Aero in Green changes to Water in Blue when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Smudge
pve_actions.effect:
Quickly dash 15 yalms forward.
Additional Effect: Increases movement speed
Duration: 5s
Cannot be executed while bound.

pve_actions.name: Fire II in Red
pve_actions.effect:
Deals fire damage with a potency of 180 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Additional Effect: Grants Aetherhues
Duration: 30s
Cannot be executed while under the effect of Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.

pve_actions.name: Creature Motif
pve_actions.effect:
Paints a creature motif.
This action changes when placed on the hotbar in the order of Pom Motif, Wing Motif, Claw Motif, and Maw Motif when executed in succession.
Cast immediately when used outside of combat.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.
Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Living Muse
pve_actions.effect:
Render your depiction of a creature to life.
This action changes to Pom Muse, Winged Muse, Clawed Muse, or Fanged Muse based on your current motif.
Maximum Charges: 3
Can only be executed when a Creature Motif is depicted on the Creature Canvas.

pve_actions.name: Mog of the Ages
pve_actions.effect:
Render your moogle portrait to life, dealing unaspected damage to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 1,000 for the first enemy, and 70% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while Moogle Portrait is active.

pve_actions.name: Pom Motif
pve_actions.effect:
Paints a pom.
Cast immediately when used outside of combat.
The Creature Canvas must be empty to execute this action.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.
Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Creature Motif changes to Pom Motif when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Wing Motif
pve_actions.effect:
Paints a pair of wings.
Cast immediately when used outside of combat.
The Creature Canvas must be empty to execute this action.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.
Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Creature Motif changes to Wing Motif when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Pom Muse
pve_actions.effect:
Render a rain of poms, dealing unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 800 for the first enemy, and 70% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Adds Depiction of Pom to the Creature Canvas
Maximum Charges: 3
Can only be executed while a pom is painted on the Creature Canvas.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Living Muse changes to Pom Muse when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Winged Muse
pve_actions.effect:
Render a pair of windborne wings, dealing unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 800 for the first enemy, and 70% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Adds Depiction of Wings to the Creature Canvas
Also paints a Moogle Portrait when Depiction of Pom and Depiction of Wings are rendered on the Creature Canvas.
Maximum Charges: 3
Can only be executed while a pair of wings is painted on the Creature Canvas.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Living Muse changes to Winged Muse when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Aero II in Green
pve_actions.effect:
Deals wind damage with a potency of 200 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Additional Effect: Grants Aetherhues II
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while under the effect of Aetherhues and not under the effect of Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Fire II in Red changes to Aero II in Green when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Water II in Blue
pve_actions.effect:
Deals water damage with a potency of 220 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Additional Effect: Increases Palette Gauge by 25
Additional Effect: Grants White Paint
Maximum Stacks: 5
Can only be executed while under the effect of Aetherhues II and not under the effect of Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Aero II in Green changes to Water II in Blue when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Weapon Motif
pve_actions.effect:
Paints a weapon motif.
This action changes to Hammer Motif when placed on the hotbar.
Cast immediately when used outside of combat.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.
Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Steel Muse
pve_actions.effect:
Render your depiction of a weapon to life.
This action changes to Striking Muse based on your current motif.
Maximum Charges: 2
Can only be executed in combat and when a Weapon Motif is depicted on the Weapon Canvas.

pve_actions.name: Hammer Stamp
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage as a critical direct hit with a potency of 560 for the first enemy, and 70% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Hammer Time.

pve_actions.name: Hammer Motif
pve_actions.effect:
Paints a hammer.
Cast immediately when used outside of combat.
Cannot be executed while under the effect of Hammer Time.
The Weapon Canvas must be empty to execute this action.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.
Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Weapon Motif changes to Hammer Motif when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Striking Muse
pve_actions.effect:
Render a mighty hammer, granting three stacks of Hammer Time.
Duration: 30s
Maximum Charges: 2
Can only be executed while in combat and when a hammer is painted on the Weapon Canvas.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Steel Muse changes to Striking Muse when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Blizzard in Cyan
pve_actions.effect:
Deals ice damage with a potency of 860.
Additional Effect: Grants Aetherhues
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while under the effect of Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Blizzard II in Cyan
pve_actions.effect:
Deals ice damage with a potency of 360 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Additional Effect: Grants Aetherhues
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while under the effect of Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Subtractive Palette
pve_actions.effect:
Grants 3 stacks of Subtractive Palette.
Additional Effect: Grants Monochrome Tones
Monochrome Tones Effect: Converts one stack of White Paint into Black Paint
Cannot be cast while under the effect of Subtractive Palette.
Palette Gauge Cost: 50

pve_actions.name: Stone in Yellow
pve_actions.effect:
Deals earth damage with a potency of 900.
Additional Effect: Grants Aetherhues II
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while under the effect of Aetherhues and Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Blizzard in Cyan changes to Stone in Yellow when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Thunder in Magenta
pve_actions.effect:
Deals lightning damage with a potency of 940.
Additional Effect: Grants White Paint
Maximum Stacks: 5
Can only be executed while under the effect of Aetherhues II and Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Stone in Yellow changes to Thunder in Magenta when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Stone II in Yellow
pve_actions.effect:
Deals earth damage with a potency of 380 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Additional Effect: Grants Aetherhues II
Duration: 30s
Can only be executed while under the effect of Aetherhues and Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Blizzard II in Cyan changes to Stone II in Yellow when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Thunder II in Magenta
pve_actions.effect:
Deals lightning damage with a potency of 400 to target and all enemies nearby it.
Additional Effect: Grants White Paint
Maximum Stacks: 5
Can only be executed while under the effect of Aetherhues II and Subtractive Palette.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Stone II in Yellow changes to Thunder II in Magenta when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Landscape Motif
pve_actions.effect:
Paints a landscape motif.
This action changes to Starry Sky Motif when placed on the hotbar.
Cast immediately when used outside of combat.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.
Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Scenic Muse
pve_actions.effect:
Render your depiction of a landscape to life.
This action changes to Starry Muse based on your current motif.
Can only be executed in combat and when a Landscape Motif is depicted on the Landscape Canvas.

pve_actions.name: Starry Sky Motif
pve_actions.effect:
Paints a starry sky.
Cast immediately when used outside of combat.
Cannot be executed while under the effect of Starry Muse.
The Landscape Canvas must be empty to execute this action.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.
Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Landscape Motif changes to Starry Sky Motif when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Starry Muse
pve_actions.effect:
Render a star streaming sky over a magicked landscape, increasing damage dealt by self and nearby party members by 5%.
Duration: 20s
Additional Effect: Grants Subtractive Spectrum
Duration: 30s
Additional Effect: Grants Inspiration and 5 stacks of Hyperphantasia
Stacks of Hyperphantasia are consumed upon casting certain spells while under the effect of Inspiration.
Duration: 30s
Inspiration Effect: Reduces cast time and recast time of Star Prism and aetherhue spells by 25% while standing within the bounds of the magicked landscape
Effect expires when all stacks of Hyperphantasia are consumed.
Additional Effect: Grants Rainbow Bright upon consuming all 5 stacks of Hyperphantasia
Duration: 30s
Rainbow Bright Effect: Rainbow Drip can be cast immediately and has a reduced recast timer
Additional Effect: Grants Starstruck
Duration: 20s
Can only be executed while in combat and when a starry sky is painted on the Landscape Canvas.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Scenic Muse changes to Starry Muse when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Holy in White
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 570 for the first enemy, and 65% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while under the effect of White Paint.
Cannot be executed while under the effect of Monochrome Tones.
White Paint Cost: 1
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.

pve_actions.name: Hammer Brush
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage as a critical direct hit with a potency of 580 for the first enemy, and 70% less for all remaining enemies.
Combo Action: Hammer Stamp
Can only be executed while under the effect of Hammer Time.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Hammer Stamp changes to Hammer Brush when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Polishing Hammer
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage as a critical direct hit with a potency of 600 for the first enemy, and 70% less for all remaining enemies.
Combo Action: Hammer Brush
Can only be executed while under the effect of Hammer Time.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Hammer Brush changes to Polishing Hammer when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Tempera Grassa
pve_actions.effect:
Removes Tempera Coat to create a barrier around self and all nearby party members that absorbs damage totaling 10% of maximum HP.
Duration: 10s
Reduces the recast time of Tempera Coat by 30 seconds when barrier is completely absorbed.
Can only be executed when under the effect of Tempera Coat.

pve_actions.name: Comet in Black
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 940 for the first enemy, and 65% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Black Paint and Monochrome Tones.
Black Paint Cost: 1
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Rainbow Drip
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 1,000 for the first enemy, and 85% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Grants White Paint
Maximum Stacks: 5
When Rainbow Bright is active, Rainbow Drip can be cast immediately and its recast timer is reduced.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

pve_actions.name: Claw Motif
pve_actions.effect:
Paints a claw.
Cast immediately when used outside of combat.
The Creature Canvas must be empty to execute this action.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.
Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Creature Motif changes to Claw Motif when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Maw Motif
pve_actions.effect:
Paints a set of fangs.
Cast immediately when used outside of combat.
The Creature Canvas must be empty to execute this action.
This action does not share a recast timer with any other actions. Recast timer cannot be affected by status effects or gear attributes.
Upon execution, the recast timer for this action will be applied to all other weaponskills and magic actions.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Creature Motif changes to Maw Motif when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Clawed Muse
pve_actions.effect:
Render a sharpened claw, dealing unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 800 for the first enemy, and 70% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Adds Depiction of Claw to the Creature Canvas
Maximum Charges: 3
Can only be executed while a claw is painted on the Creature Canvas.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Living Muse changes to Clawed Muse when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Fanged Muse
pve_actions.effect:
Render a set of ferocious fangs, dealing unaspected damage to target and all enemies nearby it with a potency of 800 for the first enemy, and 70% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Adds Depiction of Fangs to the Creature Canvas
Also paints a Madeen Portrait when Depiction of Pom, Depiction of Wings, Depiction of Claw, and Depiction of Fangs are rendered on the Creature Canvas.
All depictions are removed from the canvas upon execution.
Maximum Charges: 3
Can only be executed while fangs are painted on the Creature Canvas.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Living Muse changes to Fanged Muse when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Retribution of the Madeen
pve_actions.effect:
Render your Madeen portrait to life, dealing unaspected damage to all enemies in a straight line before you with a potency of 1,100 for the first enemy, and 70% less for all remaining enemies.
Can only be executed while Madeen Portrait is active.

※This action cannot be assigned to a hotbar.
※Mog of the Ages changes to Retribution of the Madeen when requirements for execution are met.

pve_actions.name: Star Prism
pve_actions.effect:
Deals unaspected damage with a potency of 1,100 for the first enemy, and 70% less for all remaining enemies.
Additional Effect: Restores HP of all party members within 30 yalms of target
Cure Potency: 400
Can only be executed while under the effect of Starstruck.
When standing within the bounds of Starry Muse, consumes a stack of Hyperphantasia if available.

pve_actions.name: Addle
pve_actions.effect:
Lowers target's physical damage dealt by 5% and magic damage dealt by 10%.
Duration: 15s

pve_actions.name: Sleep
pve_actions.effect:
Puts target and all nearby enemies to sleep.
Duration: 30s
Cancels auto-attack upon execution.

pve_actions.name: Lucid Dreaming
pve_actions.effect:
Gradually restores own MP.
Potency: 55
Duration: 21s

pve_actions.name: Swiftcast
pve_actions.effect:
Next spell is cast immediately.
Duration: 10s

pve_actions.name: Surecast
pve_actions.effect:
Spells can be cast without interruption.
Additional Effect: Nullifies most knockback and draw-in effects
Duration: 6s

traits.name: Maim and Mend
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and HP restoration by 10%.

traits.name: Maim and Mend II
traits.effect: Increases base action damage and HP restoration by 30%.

traits.name: Pictomancy Mastery
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Fire in Red to 310, Aero in Green to 350, Water in Blue to 390, Pom Muse to 700, Winged Muse to 700, Mog of the Ages to 800, and Hammer Stamp to 420.

traits.name: Palette Gauge
traits.effect: Allows for Palette Gauge accumulation upon the landing of Water in Blue and Water II in Blue.

traits.name: Pictomancy Mastery II
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Fire in Red to 380, Aero in Green to 420, Water in Blue to 460, Fire II in Red to 150, Aero II in Green to 170, Water II in Blue to 190, Hammer Stamp to 500, Blizzard in Cyan to 680, Stone in Yellow to 720, Thunder in Magenta to 760, Blizzard II in Cyan to 330, Stone II in Yellow to 350, and Thunder II in Magenta to 370.

traits.name: Enhanced Artistry
traits.effect: Grants White Paint upon the landing of Water in Blue, Water II in Blue, Thunder in Magenta, and Thunder II in Magenta.

traits.name: Enhanced Pictomancy
traits.effect:
Grants 5 stacks of Hyperphantasia upon executing Starry Muse.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Enhanced Smudge
traits.effect:
Increases movement speed after executing Smudge.
Duration: 5s

traits.name: Pictomancy Mastery III
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Fire in Red to 420, Aero in Green to 460, Water in Blue to 500, Pom Muse to 800, Winged Muse to 800, Mog of the Ages to 1,000, Hammer Stamp to 540, Blizzard in Cyan to 750, Stone in Yellow to 790, Thunder in Magenta to 830, and Holy in White to 500.

traits.name: Enhanced Pictomancy II
traits.effect:
Hammer Stamp changes to Hammer Brush upon execution, which in turn changes to Polishing Hammer upon execution.
Additionally allows the accumulation of charges for consecutive uses of Striking Muse.
Maximum Charges: 2

traits.name: Enhanced Tempera
traits.effect:
Allows the execution of Tempera Grassa.
Can only be executed while under the effect of Tempera Coat.

traits.name: Enhanced Palette
traits.effect:
Grants Monochrome Tones upon executing Subtractive Palette.
Monochrome Tones Effect: Converts one stack of White Paint into Black Paint

traits.name: Enhanced Pictomancy III
traits.effect:
Grants Rainbow Bright upon consuming all stacks of Hyperphantasia. Stacks may be depleted by casting aetherhue spells.
Duration: 30s

traits.name: Pictomancy Mastery IV
traits.effect: Increases the potency of Fire in Red to 490, Aero in Green to 530, Water in Blue to 570, Fire II in Red to 180, Aero II in Green to 200, Water II in Blue to 220, Hammer Stamp to 560, Blizzard in Cyan to 860, Stone in Yellow to 900, Thunder in Magenta to 940, Blizzard II in Cyan to 360, Stone II in Yellow to 380, Thunder II in Magenta to 400, Holy in White to 570, Hammer Brush to 580, Polishing Hammer to 600, and Comet in Black to 940.

traits.name: Enhanced Pictomancy IV
traits.effect: Allows a third charge of Living Muse. In addition, Claw Motif and Maw Motif may now be performed after executing Living Muse.

traits.name: Enhanced Pictomancy V
traits.effect:
Grants Starstruck upon executing Starry Muse.
Duration: 20s

traits.name: Enhanced Swiftcast
traits.effect: Reduces Swiftcast recast time to 40 seconds.

traits.name: Enhanced Addle
traits.effect: Extends the duration of Addle to 15 seconds.
